# Chapter 11: Optics  (~110 pp)
- 11.1 Geometric optics: lenses, mirrors (15) · 11.2 Aberrations (12) · 11.3 Wave optics: interference, diffraction (18) · 11.4 Coherence and lasers preview (12) · 11.5 Imaging systems: cameras, microscopes, telescopes (18) · 11.6 Optical fibres (15) · 11.7 Failure section: aberrations that ruined missions (Hubble primary mirror, again) (20)

**Archetype**: transport, scaling, failure. **Project**: build a simple Michelson interferometer; measure a small displacement. **Exercises**: 30.
